{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/LinearAlgebra.jl/issues/388","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/LinearAlgebra.jl","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/LinearAlgebra.jl/issues/388/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/LinearAlgebra.jl/issues/388/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/LinearAlgebra.jl/issues/388/events","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/LinearAlgebra.jl/issues/388","id":2694303248,"node_id":"MDU6SXNzdWUyNjk0MzAzMjQ4","number":388,"title":"+ and - throw error with UpperTriangular matrices","user":{"login":"diegozea","id":2822757,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjI4MjI3NTc=","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/2822757?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea","html_url":"https://github.com/diegozea","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"labels":[{"id":7801806138,"node_id":"LA_kwDONPNfxc8AAAAB0QYdOg","url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/LinearAlgebra.jl/labels/linear%20algebra","name":"linear algebra","color":"f2b3db","default":false,"description":"Linear algebra"}],"state":"closed","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":13,"created_at":"2016-12-15T21:54:08Z","updated_at":"2024-11-26T11:27:10Z","closed_at":"2017-01-05T04:09:53Z","author_association":"NONE","sub_issues_summary":{"total":0,"completed":0,"percent_completed":0},"active_lock_reason":null,"body":"```
julia> m = [ 1 2 3
             4 5 6
             7 8 9 ]
3×3 Array{Int64,2}:
 1  2  3
 4  5  6
 7  8  9

julia> UpperTriangular(m)
3×3 UpperTriangular{Int64,Array{Int64,2}}:
 1  2  3
 ⋅  5  6
 ⋅  ⋅  9

julia> UpperTriangular(m) + 2
ERROR: ArgumentError: cannot set index in the lower triangular part (2, 1) of an UpperTriangular matrix to a nonzero value (2)
 in setindex!(::UpperTriangular{Int64,Array{Int64,2}}, ::Int64, ::Int64, ::Int64) at ./linalg/triangular.jl:122
 in .+(::UpperTriangular{Int64,Array{Int64,2}}, ::Int64) at ./arraymath.jl:82
 in +(::UpperTriangular{Int64,Array{Int64,2}}, ::Int64) at ./arraymath.jl:94

julia> UpperTriangular(m) - 2
ERROR: ArgumentError: cannot set index in the lower triangular part (2, 1) of an UpperTriangular matrix to a nonzero value (-2)
 in setindex!(::UpperTriangular{Int64,Array{Int64,2}}, ::Int64, ::Int64, ::Int64) at ./linalg/triangular.jl:122
 in .-(::UpperTriangular{Int64,Array{Int64,2}}, ::Int64) at ./arraymath.jl:82
 in -(::UpperTriangular{Int64,Array{Int64,2}}, ::Int64) at ./arraymath.jl:96

julia> versioninfo()
Julia Version 0.5.0
Commit 3c9d753 (2016-09-19 18:14 UTC)
Platform Info:
  System: Linux (x86_64-pc-linux-gnu)
  CPU: Intel(R) Core(TM) i5 CPU         750  @ 2.67GHz
  WORD_SIZE: 64
  BLAS: libopenblas (USE64BITINT DYNAMIC_ARCH NO_AFFINITY Nehalem)
  LAPACK: libopenblas64_
  LIBM: libopenlibm
  LLVM: libLLVM-3.7.1 (ORCJIT, nehalem)
```","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/LinearAlgebra.jl/issues/388/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/LinearAlgebra.jl/issues/388/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":"completed"}}

{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56315","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56315/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56315/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56315/events","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56315","id":2611243805,"node_id":"I_kwDOABkWpM6bpGsd","number":56315,"title":"zeros performance regression in Julia 1.11","user":{"login":"diegozea","id":2822757,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjI4MjI3NTc=","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/2822757?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea","html_url":"https://github.com/diegozea","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-10-24T11:12:28Z","updated_at":"2024-10-24T11:12:28Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"CONTRIBUTOR","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"Hi! I was trying to chase some performance regression, and I have found that the regression is possibly due to the `zeros` function being slower in Julia 1.11.1 compared to Julia 1.10.5—when we compare the median values, as the minimum value is slower in the former. I found that because my function calling `zeros` is spending a lot of time at 
https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/blob/8f5b7ca12ad48c6d740e058312fc8cf2bbe67848/base/array.jl#L578
because of
https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/blob/8f5b7ca12ad48c6d740e058312fc8cf2bbe67848/base/boot.jl#L516 
according to the profiler.

```

{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/www.julialang.org/issues/2054","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/www.julialang.org","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/www.julialang.org/issues/2054/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/www.julialang.org/issues/2054/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/www.julialang.org/issues/2054/events","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/www.julialang.org/issues/2054","id":2138159721,"node_id":"I_kwDOBTjKgc5_cbpp","number":2054,"title":"Download Page: Prioritize 'Official Binaries for Manual Download' Over 'Supported Platforms'","user":{"login":"diegozea","id":2822757,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjI4MjI3NTc=","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/2822757?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea","html_url":"https://github.com/diegozea","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/diegozea/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-02-16T09:01:31Z","updated_at":"2024-02-16T09:01:31Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"CONTRIBUTOR","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"**Problem:**
The current placement of the "Supported Platforms" section before "Official Binaries for Manual Download" in the Julia installation guide complicates installation for users in environments that restrict access to the Windows Store or similar services. This layout necessitates unnecessary navigation, hindering accessibility.

**Solution:**
Reorganize the installation guide to list "Official Binaries for Manual Download" before the "Supported Platforms" section. This change will make manual download options more visible and accessible, streamlining the installation process for users facing institutional restrictions.

**Additional Context:**
In many academic and corporate settings, security policies limit the use of platform-specific stores for software installation. Prioritizing manual download options can significantly improve accessibility and user experience for those in such environments.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/www.julialang.org/issues/2054/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/www.julialang.org/issues/2054/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null}}

This layout necessitates unnecessary navigation, hindering accessibility.

**Solution:**
Reorganize the installation guide to list "Official Binaries for Manual Download" before the "Supported Platforms" section. This change will make manual download options more visible and accessible, streamlining the installation process for users facing institutional restrictions.

```
App installation failed with error message: error 0x80D03002: Opening the package from location Julia-1.14.5.0.appxbundle failed. (0x80d03002)
```

Then, the MSI installer works fine, but, strangely, you need to execute Julia a first time from the Windows menu to have Julia later downloaded, installed, and on the path—in comparison with the `.exe` installer that does all that before the first call to Julia.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/www.julialang.org/issues/comments/1948287531/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"performed_via_github_app":null}}
